what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for an image asset named recent-pitches/p-36 in the design-source channel; it stores YAML frontmatter metadata (id, address, channel, path, blob URI, MIME type, dimensions, source, author session, creation time, links) and a one-line body label identifying it as design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter with an id of recent-pitches/p-36 and an image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-36 address
MIME type is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
source field is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-36.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image/jpeg record
Content-addressed blob reference in the frontmatter
Explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' annotation in the body
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a consistent ledger-style schema
References assets via stable image:// and blob:// URIs
Includes empty arrays for absent relationships
concerns: Image dimensions are 0, which is unusual for an image/jpeg ledger entry and may indicate missing metadata extraction
No alt text, caption, or content description is provided
links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are recorded
source uses snake_case while other fields use kebab-case or camel conventions
notes: A sparse, content-addressed ledger stub for a design-source pitch image that carries provenance metadata but lacks dimensional and descriptive details.
questions: Why are the width and height zero for an image/jpeg entry?
What visual content does recent-pitches/p-36.jpg actually contain?
What does author_session ch-3mpkjg3r correspond to?
Are the empty links intentional or simply not yet populated?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file is presented as a SOURCE design ground-truth record for an image, and it does record an image asset with provenance metadata.
apparent_themes: Minimal metadata stubs for media assets
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to create a stable, referenceable ledger entry for a pitch image so that design-source material can be tracked by id, blob, author, and timestamp.
novelty: The combination of a declared image/jpeg with zero width/height and an explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' body label is unusual for a typical image ledger entry.
contribution: It contributes a stable, content-addressed metadata stub for a design-source pitch image, including a blob reference, author session, and creation timestamp that a fused system could use for provenance and retrieval.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger entry for an image asset named recent-pitches/p-36 in the design-source channel, referencing blob://b2:de47c348310c4a7e9fbba580be151834 with zero width and height and a 'SOURCE design ground-truth' label.
intention_for_embedding: This file was intended to record provenance and a stable reference for a design-source pitch image used as ground-truth material.
